basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Guwahati is recruiting a highly motivated JRF for an innovative project focusing on FRP solutions for underwater structural rehabilitation. This is a great opportunity for Mechanical/Production Engineering postgraduates with GATE qualification.

important_dates.venue: Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Guwahati

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: Post Graduate degree in Mechanical / Production Engineering or allied fields selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship) or GATE or National Level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and Agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, DRDO, etc.).

selection_process: Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.
how_to_apply: Visit the Recruitment Portal of Research & Development Cell, IIT Guwahati: https://iitg.ac.in/rndproj/recruitment/
Search for the project title and apply online.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the offline interview.
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. The position is purely temporary. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification 2026

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification 2026

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati invites applications for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in the Department of Mechanical Engineering for the project "Development of Innovation FRP Solutions for Underwater Structural Rehabilitation". Download IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification 2026

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Guwahati is recruiting a highly motivated JRF for an innovative project focusing on FRP solutions for underwater structural rehabilitation. This is a great opportunity for Mechanical/Production Engineering postgraduates with GATE qualification.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_guwahati: Development of Innovation FRP Solutions for Underwater Structural Rehabilitation

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Guwahati

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Post Graduate degree in Mechanical / Production Engineering or allied fields selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship) or GATE or National Level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and Agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, DRDO, etc.).

content_sections.heading: Pay & Benefits
content_sections.text: Pay: Rs. 31,000/- per month HRA: 18% Medical Facility: Yes Duration: 3 Months

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the Recruitment Portal of Research & Development Cell, IIT Guwahati: https://iitg.ac.in/rndproj/recruitment/ Search for the project title and apply online. Follow all instructions carefully. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the offline interview. For technical assistance: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. The position is purely temporary. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Important Links
content_sections.text: Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for JRF at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for JRF (GATE) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF in IIT Guwahati FRP Project?
faq.answer: Rs. 31,000/- + 18% HRA per month with medical facility.

faq.question: Q4. What qualification is required for IIT Guwahati JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Post Graduate in Mechanical/Production Engineering with GATE or NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. When is the interview for IIT Guwahati JRF position?
faq.answer: The offline interview is on 24 July 2026 at 12:00 PM.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE mandatory for IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, GATE or equivalent national level qualification is required.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIT Guwahati Mechanical Engineering JRF?
faq.answer: Apply online through https://iitg.ac.in/rndproj/recruitment/

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration for JRF at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The appointment duration is 3 months.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be provided for IIT Guwahati JRF Interview?
faq.answer: No, TA/DA will not be paid.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for the FRP Underwater Rehabilitation Project?
faq.answer: Prof. Ujendra Kumar Komal
